_doc: === CAUSAL LINK: Directed cause-effect relationship between situations ===
_from_situation: REQUIRED. UUID of the causing situation.
_to_situation: REQUIRED. UUID of the resulting situation.
mechanism: Documents obtained at the harbor meeting are the subject of Volkov's analysis
_mechanism: OPTIONAL. Human-readable description of HOW the cause produces the effect.
_strength: OPTIONAL (default: 0.5). Float 0.0-1.0. How strongly the cause contributes to the effect.
_causal_type: OPTIONAL (default: Contributing). One of: Necessary (effect cannot happen without cause), Sufficient (cause alone guarantees effect), Contributing (cause increases likelihood), Enabling (cause makes effect possible but doesn't trigger it).
_maturity: OPTIONAL (default: Candidate). Same maturity levels as entities.

mechanism: Volkov's document analysis provides evidence that triggers the investigation
